key_features: Comprehensive unit test coverage for conflict resolution scenarios
Testing of multiple conflict resolution strategies
Edge case and error scenario testing
conflict_resolver_test.dart.architecture: Service layer test following Flutter/Dart testing patterns with comprehensive coverage

patterns_discovered.strategy_testing_pattern: Testing multiple conflict resolution strategies (last-write-wins, server-wins, client-wins)
patterns_discovered.manual_resolution_workflow: Testing manual intervention flows for conflict resolution
patterns_discovered.batch_operation_testing: Testing bulk conflict resolution operations for efficiency
patterns_discovered.logging_verification_pattern: Testing conflict logging and tracking mechanisms
patterns_discovered.edge_case_coverage: Comprehensive testing of edge cases and boundary conditions
patterns_discovered.conflict_type_diversity: Testing different types of conflicts (updates, deletes, creates)

gotchas_discovered.conflict_strategy_complexity: Different conflict resolution strategies have different implications and edge cases
gotchas_discovered.manual_resolution_state_management: Manual resolution requires proper state management and validation
gotchas_discovered.batch_resolution_performance: Batch operations need to handle performance and memory constraints
gotchas_discovered.conflict_logging_completeness: Logging must capture all relevant conflict metadata for debugging
gotchas_discovered.timestamp_comparison_logic: Last-write-wins requires robust timestamp comparison and validation

approach_outcome.strategy: Comprehensive conflict resolution testing with multiple strategy coverage
approach_outcome.effectiveness: Successfully implemented extensive test coverage (1079 lines) for conflict resolution functionality
approach_outcome.completeness: Complete coverage of all conflict scenarios including manual resolution, batch operations, and edge cases
approach_outcome.architectural_consistency: Follows Flutter/Dart testing best practices with mocktail for proper mocking
approach_outcome.quality_metrics: High-quality tests covering 25+ test cases across multiple resolution strategies and scenarios

recommendations.integration_conflict_testing: Add integration tests to verify conflict resolution works end-to-end with real sync operations
recommendations.performance_conflict_benchmarks: Test conflict resolution performance with large datasets and concurrent conflicts
recommendations.ui_conflict_handling: Consider UI integration tests for manual conflict resolution workflows
recommendations.real_world_conflict_scenarios: Enhance tests with realistic conflict scenarios from production data
recommendations.conflict_metrics_tracking: Add metrics to track conflict resolution success rates and strategy effectiveness
recommendations.async_conflict_handling: Expand tests to cover async conflict resolution scenarios
